_comment: Accepted control-ux violations (check-control-ux.js). Each entry is a known issue accepted with a reason. The guard fails the build on violations NOT listed here. Key shape: { check, block, attr, violation, reason }. To accept, add here; to fix, update the block + delete the entry.

accepted.reason: Baselined on seed run 2026-06-11. Fix: Block declares responsive family minHeight/minHeightMobile and writes minHeightMobile via setAttributes in its own edit.js without a <ResponsiveControl> wrapper or delegation to a shared component (TypographyControls/SpacingControl/ContainerWrapperControls).

Baselined on seed run 2026-06-11. Fix: Block declares responsive family fontSize/fontSizeTablet and writes fontSizeTablet via setAttributes in its own edit.js without a <ResponsiveControl> wrapper or delegation to a shared component (TypographyControls/SpacingControl/ContainerWrapperControls).

Baselined on seed run 2026-06-11. Fix: Block declares responsive family fontSize/fontSizeMobile and writes fontSizeMobile via setAttributes in its own edit.js without a <ResponsiveControl> wrapper or delegation to a shared component (TypographyControls/SpacingControl/ContainerWrapperControls).

Baselined on seed run 2026-06-11. Fix: Block has a SelectControl writing customWidthUnit via setAttributes in its own edit.js. Replace with a <UnitControl> (integrated unit-inside-input) or delegate to a shared component (TypographyControls/SpacingControl).

Baselined on seed run 2026-06-11. Fix: Block has a SelectControl writing minHeightUnit via setAttributes in its own edit.js. Replace with a <UnitControl> (integrated unit-inside-input) or delegate to a shared component (TypographyControls/SpacingControl).

Baselined on seed run 2026-06-11. Fix: Block writes columnsTablet directly via setAttributes in its own edit.js even though a shared responsive component is also mounted. Either remove the direct control (delegate fully to the shared component) or wrap the direct control in <ResponsiveControl>.
